name: Cashew Uncheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the agar into the cold water, then simmer over low heat to soften it.
2. Pour half of the agar water into a blender and process with half the cashews and sunflower seeds. Blend until creamy (overfilling the blender will result in an uneven texture).
3. Add half of each remaining ingredient and blend until creamy.
4. Pour the mixture into a mixing bowl.
5. Process the other half of ingredients the same way.
6. Thoroughly mix the two batches together and pour into a mold or bowl.
7. Chill until set.
